name: Real World :: queue item investigation plan
objective: Ask Nova to use the standing work queue as an operator input and turn the next open item into an actionable investigation plan.
messages: Look at the standing work queue and tell me what we should investigate next and why.
Give me the shortest investigation plan that would let an operator confirm the issue and decide whether it blocks release.
success_signals: Nova uses queue context rather than answering generically.
Nova explains why the next item matters.
Nova produces a short operator-usable plan instead of broad speculation.
failure_signals: Nova ignores the queue surface entirely.
Nova provides a generic debugging list with no tie to the next item.
Nova cannot maintain the thread across the follow-up turn.
notes: This task checks whether Nova can convert its own generated work queue into operator-grade execution guidance.
